name: Chocolate Chip Cranberry Cheese Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and brown sugar in a large bowl until creamy.
2. Beat in flour, oats, and orange zest until crumbly.
3. Stir in chocolate chips and cranberries; reserve 2 cups of the mixture.
4. Press remaining mixture onto the bottom of a greased 13-by-9-inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 15 minutes.
6. Beat cream cheese in a small bowl until smooth.
7. Gradually beat in sweetened condensed milk.
8. Pour over hot crust; sprinkle with reserved oat mixture.
9. Return to oven and bake 25 to 30 minutes or until center is set.
10. Cool in pan on wire rack.
Makes about 3 dozen.
